ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Allen Kcat, Esq. for and with plaintiff Antonio Ma, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff, and against the Defaulted Defendant Robert Giarrusso, Stuart Draper and SRT Automotive, Inc. , a California corp. for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $5148.23
Attorney fees $17,036.72
Interest $606.30
Costs - $515.00
Total $23,306.25
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
